description_long: This bungalow features a low-pitched, gable roof with wide overhangs and a covered front porch supported by square columns. The exterior walls are finished in a light color, accented by vertical stripes and decorative panels, with a mix of window sizes and placements. The front facade includes a prominent porch area, while the rear shows a secondary entrance and additional wall detailing. The side elevations reveal a combination of grouped and single windows, as well as subtle color accents. The roof is clad in dark shingles, and the structure sits on a rectangular green plot, suggesting a suburban or urban lot. The overall design is compact, single-story, and emphasizes horizontal lines and functional outdoor space.
description: A single-story bungalow with a gable roof, covered front porch, and a mix of grouped and single windows, finished in light tones with decorative accents.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch, square columns, and main entrance beneath the gable roof.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated facade, vertical accent stripes, and a secondary entrance.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying additional wall detailing, a door, and grouped windows on the left side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with visible accent stripes, single windows, and the extended roof overhang.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and single windows
